sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28177" key="doulokoi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δουλο-κοίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n28177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consorting with slaves,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">O.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
